LOCK_SAU - LOCK_SAU 0b00..Reserved 0b01..CM33 (CPU0) LOCK_SAU is 1 0b10..CM33 (CPU0) LOCK_SAU is 0 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_CPU0_LOCK_REG_CM33_LOCK_REG_LOCK

#define AHBSC_CPU0_LOCK_REG_CM33_LOCK_REG_LOCK (   x)

CM33_LOCK_REG_LOCK - CM33_LOCK_REG_LOCK 0b00..Reserved 0b01..CM33_LOCK_REG_LOCK is 1 0b10..CM33_LOCK_REG_LOCK is 0 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_WRITE_LOCK [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_WRITE_LOCK (   x)

WRITE_LOCK - Write Lock 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Writes to this register and to the Memory and Peripheral RULE registers are not allowed 0b10..Writes to this register and to the Memory and Peripheral RULE registers are allowed 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_ENABLE_SECURE_CHECKING [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_ENABLE_SECURE_CHECKING (   x)

ENABLE_SECURE_CHECKING - Enable Secure Checking 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Enables secure checking. Violation can be detected when the security level of a transaction does not meet the security rule of the slave or memory to be accessed. 0b10..Disables secure checking. Even if the security level of a transaction does not conform to the security rule of the slave or memory, it will not be detected as a violation. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_ENABLE_S_PRIV_CHECK [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_ENABLE_S_PRIV_CHECK (   x)

ENABLE_S_PRIV_CHECK - Enable Secure Privilege Checking 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Enables the privilege checking of secure mode access. 0b10..Disables the privilege checking of secure mode access. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_ENABLE_NS_PRIV_CHECK [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_ENABLE_NS_PRIV_CHECK (   x)

ENABLE_NS_PRIV_CHECK - Enable Non-Secure Privilege Checking 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Enables the privilege checking of non-secure mode access. 0b10..Disables the privilege checking of non-secure mode access. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_DISABLE_VIOLATION_ABORT [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_DISABLE_VIOLATION_ABORT (   x)

DISABLE_VIOLATION_ABORT - Disable Violation Abort 0b00..Reserved 0b01..The violation detected by the secure checker will not cause an abort, but a secure_violation_irq (interrupt request) will still be asserted and serviced by ISR. 0b10..The violation detected by the secure checker will cause an abort. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_DISABLE_STRICT_MODE [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_DISABLE_STRICT_MODE (   x)

DISABLE_STRICT_MODE - Disable Strict Mode 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Master can access memories and peripherals at the same level or below that level. 0b10..Master can access memories and peripherals at same level only 0b11..Reserved

DISABLE_STRICT_MODE - Disable Strict Mode 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Master strict mode is disabled and can access memories and peripherals at the same level or below that level 0b10..Master strict mode is enabled and can access memories and peripherals at same level only 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_IDAU_ALL_NS [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_IDAU_ALL_NS (   x)

IDAU_ALL_NS - IDAU All Non-Secure 0b00..Reserved 0b01..IDAU is disabled, which means that all memories are attributed as non-secure memory. 0b10..IDAU is enabled (restrictive mode) 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_WRITE_LOCK [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_WRITE_LOCK (   x)

WRITE_LOCK - Write Lock 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Writes to this register and to the Memory and Peripheral RULE registers are not allowed 0b10..Writes to this register and to the Memory and Peripheral RULE registers are allowed 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_ENABLE_SECURE_CHECKING [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_ENABLE_SECURE_CHECKING (   x)

ENABLE_SECURE_CHECKING - Enable Secure Checking 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Enables secure checking. Violation can be detected when the security level of a transaction does not meet the security rule of the slave or memory to be accessed. 0b10..Disables secure checking. Even if the security level of a transaction does not conform to the security rule of the slave or memory, it will not be detected as a violation. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_ENABLE_S_PRIV_CHECK [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_ENABLE_S_PRIV_CHECK (   x)

ENABLE_S_PRIV_CHECK - Enable Secure Privilege Checking 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Enables privilege checking of secure mode access. 0b10..Disables privilege checking of secure mode access. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_ENABLE_NS_PRIV_CHECK [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_ENABLE_NS_PRIV_CHECK (   x)

ENABLE_NS_PRIV_CHECK - Enable Non-Secure Privilege Checking 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Enables privilege checking of non-secure mode access. 0b10..Disables privilege checking of non-secure mode access is disabled. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_DISABLE_VIOLATION_ABORT [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_DISABLE_VIOLATION_ABORT (   x)

DISABLE_VIOLATION_ABORT - Disable Violation Abort 0b00..Reserved 0b01..The violation detected by the secure checker will not cause an abort, but a secure_violation_irq (interrupt request) will still be asserted and serviced by ISR. 0b10..The violation detected by the secure checker will cause an abort. 0b11..Reserved

DISABLE_VIOLATION_ABORT - Disable Violation Abort 0b00..Reserved 0b01..The violation detected by the secure checker will not cause an abort, but a secure_violation_irq (interrupt request) will still be asserted and serviced by ISR. 0b10..The violation detected by the secure checker will cause an abort and a secure_violation_irq will also be generated. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_DISABLE_STRICT_MODE [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_DISABLE_STRICT_MODE (   x)

DISABLE_STRICT_MODE - Disable Strict Mode 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Master strict mode is on and can access memories and peripherals at the same level or below that level 0b10..Master strict mode is disabled and can access memories and peripherals at same level only 0b11..Reserved

DISABLE_STRICT_MODE - Disable Strict Mode 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Master strict mode is disabled and can access memories and peripherals at the same level or below that level 0b10..Master strict mode is enabled and can access memories and peripherals at same level only 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_IDAU_ALL_NS [1/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_IDAU_ALL_NS (   x)

IDAU_ALL_NS - IDAU All Non-Secure 0b00..Reserved 0b01..IDAU is disabled, which means that all memories are attributed as non-secure memory. 0b10..IDAU is enabled (restrictive mode) 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_WRITE_LOCK [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_WRITE_LOCK (   x)

WRITE_LOCK - Write Lock 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Writes to this register and to the Memory and Peripheral RULE registers are not allowed 0b10..Writes to this register and to the Memory and Peripheral RULE registers are allowed 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_ENABLE_SECURE_CHECKING [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_ENABLE_SECURE_CHECKING (   x)

ENABLE_SECURE_CHECKING - Enable Secure Checking 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Enables secure checking. Violation can be detected when the security level of a transaction does not meet the security rule of the slave or memory to be accessed. 0b10..Disables secure checking. Even if the security level of a transaction does not conform to the security rule of the slave or memory, it will not be detected as a violation. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_ENABLE_S_PRIV_CHECK [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_ENABLE_S_PRIV_CHECK (   x)

ENABLE_S_PRIV_CHECK - Enable Secure Privilege Checking 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Enables the privilege checking of secure mode access. 0b10..Disables the privilege checking of secure mode access. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_ENABLE_NS_PRIV_CHECK [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_ENABLE_NS_PRIV_CHECK (   x)

ENABLE_NS_PRIV_CHECK - Enable Non-Secure Privilege Checking 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Enables the privilege checking of non-secure mode access. 0b10..Disables the privilege checking of non-secure mode access. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_DISABLE_VIOLATION_ABORT [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_DISABLE_VIOLATION_ABORT (   x)

DISABLE_VIOLATION_ABORT - Disable Violation Abort 0b00..Reserved 0b01..The violation detected by the secure checker will not cause an abort, but a secure_violation_irq (interrupt request) will still be asserted and serviced by ISR. 0b10..The violation detected by the secure checker will cause an abort. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_DISABLE_STRICT_MODE [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_DISABLE_STRICT_MODE (   x)

DISABLE_STRICT_MODE - Disable Strict Mode 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Master strict mode is disabled and can access memories and peripherals at the same level or below that level 0b10..Master strict mode is enabled and can access memories and peripherals at same level only 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_IDAU_ALL_NS [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_DP_REG_IDAU_ALL_NS (   x)

IDAU_ALL_NS - IDAU All Non-Secure 0b00..Reserved 0b01..IDAU is disabled, which means that all memories are attributed as non-secure memory. 0b10..IDAU is enabled (restrictive mode) 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_WRITE_LOCK [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_WRITE_LOCK (   x)

WRITE_LOCK - Write Lock 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Writes to this register and to the Memory and Peripheral RULE registers are not allowed 0b10..Writes to this register and to the Memory and Peripheral RULE registers are allowed 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_ENABLE_SECURE_CHECKING [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_ENABLE_SECURE_CHECKING (   x)

ENABLE_SECURE_CHECKING - Enable Secure Checking 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Enables secure checking. Violation can be detected when the security level of a transaction does not meet the security rule of the slave or memory to be accessed. 0b10..Disables secure checking. Even if the security level of a transaction does not conform to the security rule of the slave or memory, it will not be detected as a violation. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_ENABLE_S_PRIV_CHECK [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_ENABLE_S_PRIV_CHECK (   x)

ENABLE_S_PRIV_CHECK - Enable Secure Privilege Checking 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Enables privilege checking of secure mode access. 0b10..Disables privilege checking of secure mode access. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_ENABLE_NS_PRIV_CHECK [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_ENABLE_NS_PRIV_CHECK (   x)

ENABLE_NS_PRIV_CHECK - Enable Non-Secure Privilege Checking 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Enables privilege checking of non-secure mode access. 0b10..Disables privilege checking of non-secure mode access is disabled. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_DISABLE_VIOLATION_ABORT [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_DISABLE_VIOLATION_ABORT (   x)

DISABLE_VIOLATION_ABORT - Disable Violation Abort 0b00..Reserved 0b01..The violation detected by the secure checker will not cause an abort, but a secure_violation_irq (interrupt request) will still be asserted and serviced by ISR. 0b10..The violation detected by the secure checker will cause an abort and a secure_violation_irq will also be generated. 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_DISABLE_STRICT_MODE [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_DISABLE_STRICT_MODE (   x)

DISABLE_STRICT_MODE - Disable Strict Mode 0b00..Reserved 0b01..Master strict mode is disabled and can access memories and peripherals at the same level or below that level 0b10..Master strict mode is enabled and can access memories and peripherals at same level only 0b11..Reserved

◆ AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_IDAU_ALL_NS [2/2]

#define AHBSC_MISC_CTRL_REG_IDAU_ALL_NS (   x)

IDAU_ALL_NS - IDAU All Non-Secure 0b00..Reserved 0b01..IDAU is disabled, which means that all memories are attributed as non-secure memory. 0b10..IDAU is enabled (restrictive mode) 0b11..Reserved
